Core Features

Designed for
Your Mind

Everything you need to understand, manage, and nurture your emotional health — built on science, crafted with care.

01

Mood Tracking

Log your emotions daily and discover patterns that impact your wellbeing over time.

02

Daily Check-ins

Quick guided check-ins to reflect on how you're feeling — morning, afternoon, evening.

03

Relaxation Activities

Curated breathing exercises, meditations, and calming activities tailored to your mood.

04

Emotional Insights

Visualize your emotional journey with beautiful charts and actionable recommendations.

The Sentira Method

Your path to wellbeing.

Science-backed, human-centered. Discover how we help you navigate your inner world.

01
01

Insightful Discovery

Begin each day with a quick, science-backed emotional check-in to map your mental landscape.

02
02

Guided Resilience

Access a curated library of psychology-first activities tailored to your current emotional state.

03
03

Collaborative Growth

Connect with our community and experts to share journeys and build lasting emotional strength.

04
04

Lasting Transformation

Monitor your long-term evolution and celebrate the small wins that lead to deep, lasting change.

A Mirror to Your Mind

Our psychology-first approach helps you recognize patterns, process emotions, and build mental resilience.
